;; Metacircular evaluator for the Scheme-like language
;; Reads a file path from stdin, then evaluates that file.

;; Helper functions for pairs and lists
(define (caar x) (car (car x)))
(define (cadr x) (car (cdr x)))
(define (cdar x) (cdr (car x)))
(define (cddr x) (cdr (cdr x)))
(define (caddr x) (car (cdr (cdr x))))
(define (cadddr x) (car (cdr (cdr (cdr x)))))
(define (null? x) (eq? x '()))
(define (list? x)
  (cond ((null? x) #t)
        ((pair? x) (list? (cdr x)))
        (else #f)))

;; Association list utilities
(define (assoc key alist)
  (cond ((null? alist) #f)
        ((equal? key (caar alist)) (car alist))
        (else (assoc key (cdr alist)))))

(define (lookup var env)
  (if (null? env)
      (error "Unbound variable" var)
      (let ((binding (assoc var (car env))))
        (if binding
            (cdr binding)
            (lookup var (cdr env))))))

(define (extend env vars vals)
  (if (null? vars)
      env
      (cons (cons (cons (car vars) (car vals))
                  (car env))
            (extend (cdr env) (cdr vars) (cdr vals)))))

;; Primitive procedure table
(define primitive-procedures
  (list (cons '+ +)
        (cons '- -)
        (cons '* *)
        (cons '/ /)
        (cons '= =)
        (cons '< <)
        (cons '> >)
        (cons '<= <=)
        (cons '>= >=)
        (cons 'cons cons)
        (cons 'car car)
        (cons 'cdr cdr)
        (cons 'null? null?)
        (cons 'pair? pair?)
        (cons 'eq? eq?)
        (cons 'equal? equal?)
        (cons 'not not)
        (cons 'getchr getchr)
        (cons 'putchr putchr)
        (cons 'chr chr)
        (cons 'read read)
        (cons 'symbol symbol)
        (cons 'symbol? symbol?)
        (cons 'string? string?)
        (cons 'number? number?)
        (cons 'set-car! set-car!)
        (cons 'set-cdr! set-cdr!)
        (cons 'newline newline)
        (cons 'display display)
        (cons 'fopen fopen)
        (cons 'fclose fclose)
        (cons 'fgetchr fgetchr)
        (cons 'fputchr fputchr)
        (cons 'fdisplay fdisplay)
        (cons 'fread fread)))

(define (primitive-procedure? proc)
  (assoc proc primitive-procedures))

(define (primitive-implementation proc)
  (cdr (assoc proc primitive-procedures)))

;; Tagged data
(define (tagged-list? exp tag)
  (and (pair? exp) (eq? (car exp) tag)))

;; Eval
(define (eval exp env)
  (cond ((number? exp) exp)
        ((string? exp) exp)
        ((boolean? exp) exp)
        ((symbol? exp) (lookup exp env))
        ((tagged-list? exp 'quote) (cadr exp))
        ((tagged-list? exp 'if)
         (if (eval (cadr exp) env)
             (eval (caddr exp) env)
             (eval (cadddr exp) env)))
        ((tagged-list? exp 'define)
         (let ((var (cadr exp))
               (val (eval (caddr exp) env)))
           ;; TODO: handle function definition shorthand
           (set-car! env (cons (cons var val) (car env)))))
        (else (error "Unknown expression type" exp))))

;; Main program
(define (main)
  (let ((filename (read)))
    (let ((file (fopen filename "r")))
      (if (not file)
          (error "Cannot open file" filename)
          (let loop ((expr (fread file)))
            (if (null? expr)
                (fclose file)
                (begin
                  (eval expr (list '()))
                  (loop (fread file)))))))))

(main)

;; Metacircular evaluator for the Scheme-like language

(define (caddr x) (car (cdr (cdr x))))

  (add-primitive 'fputchr)
  (add-primitive 'fdisplay)
  (add-primitive 'fread)

(define global-env (setup-global-environment))

;; apply-primitive
(define (apply-primitive sym args)
  (cond ((eq? sym '+)
         (define (sum lst) (if (null? lst) 0 (+ (car lst) (sum (cdr lst)))))
         (sum args))
        ((eq? sym '-)

(define (tagged-list? exp tag)

;; procedure representation
(define (make-procedure params body env) (list4 'procedure params body env))
(define (procedure? proc) (tagged-list? proc 'procedure))
(define (procedure-params proc) (cadr proc))
(define (procedure-body proc) (caddr proc))
(define (procedure-env proc) (cadddr proc))

(define (eval exp env)
  (cond ((number? exp) exp)
        ((string? exp) exp)
        ((boolean? exp) exp)
        ((symbol? exp) (lookup exp env))

        ((tagged-list? exp 'let)
